releaseNotes:
✨ Stable Release v25.05.2026

• Fixed: Pomodoro timer dynamic hours display (now supports 90+ mins)
• Performance: Core stability improvements
• Optimization: Code cleanup for better reliability
updateNotes:
✨ Stable Release v25.05.2026 is ready!

• Fixed Pomodoro timer display bug.
• General stability fixes.

previousReleases.notes: Critical hotfix for Focus Insights graph division-by-zero error.
Finalized Pomodoro, QR tools, and Utilities suite.
Focus Insights, QuickLink shortener, and QR tools.

changelogArray: Fixed Pomodoro dynamic hour display (supports 1, 2, 3 digits)
Improved installer stability and core performance
Enhanced SEO and download page reliability
changelogArray-old: Launched Prep-Meter Ecosystem 2.0 with high-intensity accountability
Added Monthly Strategic Review for cumulative performance analytics
Enhanced Tactical Calendar with Hover Intel and Smart Context Menus
Implemented Target Exam Countdown and Commander's Oath for logs
New Randomized Splash Engine with 40+ psychological and focus insights
Fixed background process persistence with new Hard-Kill logic
Professional-grade installer with active process detection
knownIssues: HEIC export falls back to JPEG (system codec limitation)
